description: Paygent Connect is a SaaS payment platform that enables merchants to accept online payments, manage subscriptions, and handle recurring billing. It offers a unified API for processing credit card, bank transfer, and mobile payment methods, along with fraud detection and reporting tools.
authentication: OAuth 2.0 with client credentials grant; API keys are also supported for legacy integrations.
self_serve: Yes – merchants can sign up, configure payment methods, and manage settings through a web dashboard. The dashboard also provides access to API keys and webhook configuration.
api_surface: RESTful API with endpoints for payment processing, subscription management, customer data, and reporting. Supports JSON payloads and standard HTTP status codes.
mcp: No – Paygent Connect does not provide a multi‑cloud platform; it is hosted on Paygent’s own infrastructure.
buildability: High – the API is well documented, supports SDKs in multiple languages (Java, Python, Ruby, PHP), and offers sandbox environments for testing.
main_blocker: Limited to regions where Paygent operates; merchants outside supported countries may not be able to use the service.
